name: place_cell
short_description: Move or place one or more instances to new locations. Sites and cells are required to be listed in the right order and there should be same number of sites as number of cells.
full_help:
place_cell

Description: 
Move or place one or more instances to new locations. Sites and cells are required to be listed in the right order and there should be same number of sites as number of cells. 

Syntax: 
place_cell  [-quiet] [-verbose] <cell_site_list>...

Usage: 
  Name              Description
  -----------------------------
  [-quiet]          Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]        Suspend message limits during command execution
  <cell_site_list>  a list of cells and sites in the interleaved order 

Categories: 
Floorplan

arguments.description: Suspend message limits during command execution
